title: CNLU VC Prof Faizan Mustafa seen slapping 2 students amid police raid on boys' hostel
description: Chanakya National Law University (CNLU), Patna Vice-Chancellor Professor Faizan Mustafa was recently captured on video hitting two students even as police personnel entered the boys' hostel on March 23 to conduct a search for liquor.The video shows Prof Mustafa slap a student twice. When another student appears, the VC raises his hand and slaps him. Prof Mustafa then asks the student in Hindi,"What will you do? Are you the police? Have you lost your mind?" The student then asks why the Professor
